Name: Cash and Due from Banks
Description: Aggregate cash and correspondent balances; parent for cash-related accounts

Name: Cash in Vaults (teller drawers)
Description: Physical cash under branch custody including vaults and drawers

Name: ACH Settlement
Description: Settlement asset for accepted inbound ACH receipt files and items

Name: Cash Items in Process of Collection (CIPC)
Description: Checks accepted and in transit for external collection

Name: Returned Item Clearing
Description: Temporary holding for on-us checks and returns while resolving

Name: Deposited Items Clearing
Description: Generic clearing asset for teller-accepted deposited checks pending internal clearing, collection, return, or later settlement treatment

Name: Suspense – Unposted Cash
Description: Unverified cash items (night drop, mail) pending verification

Name: U.S. Treasury & Agency Securities
Description: Held-for-investment or AFS Treasuries and agencies

Name: Other Investment Securities
Description: Other debt or equity securities not elsewhere classified

Name: Loans Receivable (Gross)
Description: Parent for loan principal and receivables

Name: Commercial Real Estate – Interest Receivable
Description: Accrued interest receivable on CRE loans

Name: Residential Mortgages – Interest Receivable
Description: Accrued interest receivable on residential mortgages

Name: Consumer Auto Loans – Interest Receivable
Description: Accrued interest receivable on auto loans

Name: Unsecured Consumer Loans – Principal
Description: Outstanding principal for unsecured consumer loans

Name: Unsecured Consumer Loans – Interest Receivable
Description: Accrued interest receivable on unsecured consumer loans

Name: Lines of Credit – Principal
Description: Outstanding principal for revolving lines of credit

Name: Lines of Credit – Interest Receivable
Description: Accrued interest receivable for lines of credit

Name: Allowance for Credit Losses (Contra-Asset)
Description: Allowance for expected credit losses by segment

Name: Fixed Assets – Land & Buildings
Description: Cost basis of premises and buildings

Name: Furniture & Equipment
Description: Cost basis of furniture, fixtures, and equipment

Name: ACH Settlement Clearing
Description: Clearing for ACH settlements by direction and file

Name: RTP/Card Clearing
Description: Clearing for RTP or card network settlements

Name: Suspense – Unidentified Deposits
Description: Temporary holding for unidentified inbound funds

Name: Other Liabilities
Description: Parent for accrued and other liabilities

Name: Accrued Interest Payable – Deposits
Description: Accrued interest payable per deposit account

Name: Other Borrowings
Description: Other short or long-term notes payable

Name: Additional Paid-in Capital
Description: Paid-in capital in excess of par

Name: Current-Year Profit/Loss
Description: Current period net income pending close

Name: LOC Interest Income
Description: Interest income from lines of credit

Name: Loan Fee Income
Description: Late and other loan-related fee income

Name: Deposit Service Charges
Description: Fees for deposit services and maintenance

Name: Teller Cash Over and Short
Description: Net teller drawer count differences versus book cash (shortage as debit, overage as credit to this account)
